name: Platinum Australia Limited
description: Platinum Australia Limited was an Australian-based mining and exploration company incorporated in 2000, primarily focused on the exploration and development of platinum group metals, including platinum, palladium, and rhodium, as well as gold, vanadium, and titanium deposits. The company operated projects in South Africa, most notably the Smokey Hills mine. Following significant operational challenges and financial difficulties, the company was placed into voluntary administration in 2012. It was formerly listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol PLA.
